div.class: absolute size-full bg-white transition-all duration-1000 ease-out bg-[size:16px_16px] bg-[position:0_0,8px_8px] bg-[image:linear-gradient(45deg,#efefef_25%,rgba(239,239,239,0)_25%,rgba(239,239,239,0)_75%,#efefef_75%,#efefef),linear-gradient(45deg,#efefef_25%,rgba(239,239,239,0)_25%,rgba(239,239,239,0)_75%,#efefef_75%,#efefef)] [clip-path:polygon(0px_0px,0%_0px,0%_100%,0px_100%)]
